status_line: Sunday 9:41 AM UTC — SARAH's Run 106 came in clean an hour ago. The receipt filer hit a wall this morning: RAID volume is hung, Dropbox unreachable, zero receipts processed. That needs your attention. GUARDIAN is now 27 cycles dark — still the single biggest blocker on Gallery and T2 delivery. SCOUT's daily sweep fired at 10:07 UTC; results not yet confirmed. ATLAS runs at 13:04 UTC today. Three open decisions — LA Galaxy, Macy's, Glossier — carry over from last night.

agents.name: SCOUT
agents.last_action: Apr 25 sweep: 0 new prospects. Sonos confirmed in-house pivot — AOR review unlikely near-term. 11 pipeline entries stable. Today's run (10:07 UTC) just fired — results not yet confirmed.
